title: block game modpack
description: we love the crafting and mineing game :D
body:
### 20-minute adventure

**Description**: 
Make modpack -> play for 20 minutes -> leave game -> quit modpack

**Included Mods**:
1. **AE2 (Applied Energistics 2)** - _"Yes I want to subnet my storage system"_ - statements dreamed up by the utterly deranged
2. **Aether** - Adds another dimension to increase loading times and inventory clutter.
3. **AppleSkin** - Actually helpful.
4. **Farmer's Delight** - Food you'll never craft
5. **Better Combat** - Makes the game harder
6. **Better Dungeons, Strongholds, Fortresses** - Makes structures more interesting
7. **Blur** - Cooks your graphics card for eye candy
8. **Chunky** - Pregenerate the island in the middle of Infiniocean spawn
9. **From the Fog** - He's real, always has been 
10. **Configured** - Now I can see how many actions are bound to f
11. **Create** - factorio
12. **Born in Chaos** - Makes the game harder
13. **Distant Horizons** - Better than sex (not that I've had any)
14. **Tetra** - Tinkers without the stupid grout
15. **Colossal Chest** - The lazy man's hoard
16. **Protection Pixel** - Become invincible
17. **Optimization mods** - all of the above
18. **Valkyrien Skies** - crash the server when you fall off your airship
19. **Extreme Reactors** - no meltdowns sadly

**Shader Packs Included**:
- **Complementary Reimagined**: Cooks your GPU
- **Shrimple**: Cooks your GPU slightly less

This modpack is designed for friends (you and you alone) to explore (colonise), create (download schematic and place into schematicannon), and conquer together, offering a mix of aesthetic improvements (20fps -> 25fps) and gameplay enhancements (patience testing modifications) that cater to various (my own) playstyle~~s~~.
